query:
SELECT 
  ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY g.nome ASC) AS numero,
  g.nome,
  COUNT(s.id) AS total_sessoes,
  DATE_FORMAT(MIN(s.createdAt), '%d/%m/%Y') AS primeiro_acesso,
  DATE_FORMAT(MAX(s.ultimoAcesso), '%d/%m/%Y') AS ultimo_acesso
FROM sessoesGestante s
JOIN gestantes g ON g.id = s.gestanteId
GROUP BY g.id, g.nome
ORDER BY g.nome ASC
LIMIT 20 OFFSET 40;

  DATE_FORMAT(MAX(s.ultimoAcesso), '%d/%m/%Y') AS ultimo_acesso
FROM sessoesGestante s

GROUP BY g.id, g.nome
ORDER BY g.nome ASC
